name: Integration Request
about: Request a new integration connector
title: '[Integration] Tool Name'
labels: integration, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Tool Information

**Tool Name:** [e.g., Monday.com]

**API Documentation:** [Link to API docs]

**Website:** [Link to tool website]

## Integration Details

### Mode
- [ ] Full Integration (two-way sync, write access)
- [ ] Render Only (read-only access)
- [ ] Webhook-only (event ingestion)

### Authentication
- [ ] OAuth2
- [ ] API Key
- [ ] Service Account
- [ ] Other: ___________

### Entities to Sync
- [ ] Tasks
- [ ] Notes
- [ ] Conversations
- [ ] Plans
- [ ] Health Metrics
- [ ] Other: ___________

### Sync Mode
- [ ] One-way (source → Spine)
- [ ] Two-way (source ↔ Spine)
- [ ] Event-driven
- [ ] Batch

## Workflow Use Cases

Describe the workflows you want to enable:

1. [Use case 1]
2. [Use case 2]
3. [Use case 3]

## Rate Limits

**Rate Limits:** [e.g., 100 requests/minute]

**Backoff Strategy:** [e.g., Exponential backoff]

## Webhook Events (if applicable)

- [ ] Event type 1: [Description]
- [ ] Event type 2: [Description]

## Additional Context

Any additional information, screenshots, or examples.
